productName: Infused Bubble Hash Little Snappers - Lemon Boof - 2pk (2x0.5g)
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Lemon Boof flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a bright, zesty lemon flavor, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. Pace yourself.
